name: @sabnode/sabflow-triggers
description: Standalone Node service hosting long-lived IMAP IDLE workers that translate inbound email into SabFlow trigger events. Mirrors services/sabflow-ws/ shape. PM2 app name: sabflow-triggers. Default port: 4003. NOTE: lives outside Vercel Functions because IMAP IDLE connections are long-lived TCP sockets — Fluid Compute is request-shaped.
